channel.title: Lube Change - Oilers Daily News
channel.description: Daily Edmonton Oilers news from Oil Country. Hosted by Patrick in Vancouver, Canada.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: Daily Edmonton Oilers news from Oil Country. Your daily dose of Oilers news, game recaps, trades, and analysis.

item.title: Lube Change - Oilers Daily News - Episode 1 - December 17, 2025 at 04:04 PM MST
item.description: Daily Edmonton Oilers news for December 17, 2025 at 04:04 PM MST.It's your favorite grease monkey back in the shop with the freshest Lube Change - December 17, 2025 at 04:04 PM MST....
item.itunes:summary: Daily Edmonton Oilers news for December 17, 2025 at 04:04 PM MST.It's your favorite grease monkey back in the shop with the freshest Lube Change - December 17, 2025 at 04:04 PM MST....
